privileged_info_summary: The soccer carpool coordinator task uses synthetic data with 12 practice dates scheduled for April-May 2025 on Tuesdays and Thursdays. The scenario involves 8 families driving carpool duty with specific vehicle types and capacities: Sedan (4), SUV (6), and Minivan (7 passengers). The Martinez family drops out, leaving 6 dates that need driver reassignment from remaining families. The task requires agents to fill all gaps while respecting vehicle capacity constraints, applying conditional formatting, creating correct gas reimbursement formulas (budget $240), and ensuring fair distribution with no family driving more than 4 times. Success requires achieving 70% score (4+ out of 6 criteria). Timeout is 180 seconds with max 15 steps.
